Software Quality Assurance

This project demonstrates a comparative study between Manual Testing and Automation Testing in Software Quality Assurance.

  • Manual Test Case Validation
  • Automation Testing using Selenium
  • Performance Testing
  • Security Testing
  • Load Testing
  • Bug Reporting System
  • Continuous Integration Pipeline

The objective of this system is to improve software reliability, efficiency, scalability, and quality using modern testing methodologies.

Login System

Forgot Password? Create Account

Testing Objectives

This login module is used for validating authentication functionality through both manual and automation testing techniques. Selenium scripts are used for automated testing while manual testers verify user interface behavior, usability, and validation.

Developed for Research Paper: "A Comparative Study of Manual Testing and Automation Testing in Software Quality Assurance"
